title: Kairos
subtitle: Personal Growth & Habit Platform
desc: Designed a structured habit and productivity platform to help users build routines, track goals, and reduce procrastination through thoughtful UX and system design.
points: Defined user journeys for habit tracking, journaling, and progress monitoring
Designed system workflows for personalized goal management
Focused on improving engagement through structured productivity flows
Became Champion among 71 Teams at UIU Project Show for the DBMS Project

title: DirectEdge
subtitle: Agricultural Supply Chain Platform
desc: Built a multi-stakeholder platform to improve coordination across farmers, distributors, and retailers with role-based dashboards and demand forecasting.
points: Mapped workflows across multiple user roles (farmers, agents, warehouses)
Designed dashboards for inventory, order tracking, and operations
Prioritized features like demand forecasting and smart notifications
Became 1st Runner Up among 55 Teams at UIU Project Show for the Software Engineering Project

title: Wayout
subtitle: Travel Planning Platform
desc: Created an end-to-end travel planning system for destination discovery, booking, and trip coordination with role-based experiences for travelers and guides.
points: Designed role-based experiences for travelers and local guides
Structured workflows for booking, reminders, and navigation
Focused on simplifying complex travel planning processes
Became 2nd Runner Up among 66 Teams at UIU Project Show for the Advanced Object-Oriented Programming Project

title: UIU Faculty Schedule Tool
subtitle: Student Academic Utility
desc: A student-focused tool that helps users quickly find faculty availability and class schedules. Designed for real student usage with accessibility across devices.
points: Designed search and visualization workflows for quick information access
Reduced friction in academic planning and schedule discovery
Built for real student usage and accessibility across all devices
Conceived the original idea and developed the first version of this tool for use at our university

title: AutoTrack
subtitle: Vehicle Detection & Route Tracking System
desc: Developed an AI-based system for detecting vehicles and reconstructing movement paths using CCTV footage. Published at IEEE TENSYMP 2025 with ~83% tracking accuracy.
points: Used YOLO models for vehicle detection and license plate recognition
Achieved approximately 83% route tracking accuracy
Focused on solving real-world criminal investigation challenges
Novel custom dataset contributed to Roboflow public registry

title: Cook Corner
subtitle: Smart Cooking Assistant & Recipe Platform
desc: Built a full-featured culinary platform focused on recipe discovery, meal planning, nutrition awareness, and ingredient-based cooking support for a smarter kitchen experience.
points: Designed flows for recipe exploration, meal planning, and personalized cooking support
Integrated features like ingredient-based recommendations, nutrition guidance, and grocery assistance
Structured the platform to support recipe sharing, cooking courses, and kitchen tips
Focused on improving usability for home cooks, beginners, and health-conscious users

title: Shopno Self Service Pickup System
subtitle: In-Store Grocery Ordering System
desc: Developed a web-based grocery ordering solution for in-store customers, enabling QR-based access, mobile ordering, and pickup-code driven fulfillment for faster service.
points: Designed the customer journey from WiFi connection and QR scan to order placement and pickup
Built a workflow where shopkeepers prepare orders using unique pickup codes
Used a simple MVC structure to organize controllers, models, views, and database logic
Focused on improving in-store ordering efficiency and reducing service friction

title: Pigeon Trainer
subtitle: Personal Portfolio & Pigeon Care Information Website
desc: Developed a personal portfolio website for a pigeon enthusiast and farm owner, designed to showcase a passion for pigeons while also serving as an informational platform where visitors can learn about pigeon care, common health issues, and practical solutions.
points: Created a front-end website that combines a personal portfolio with educational content about pigeons and pigeon farming
Designed dedicated sections to help visitors understand pigeon breeds, care methods, common problems, and their solutions
Focused on clear content structure and readability so users can easily explore pigeon-related information
Built the website using lightweight front-end technologies to ensure simplicity, accessibility, and smooth performance
Highlighted the owner’s love for pigeons and farm experience through a clean and visually engaging layout

title: Eduford
subtitle: University Website Concept
desc: Built a multi-page university website concept with dedicated sections for courses, blog, contact, and about pages, focusing on clean layout and front-end structure.
points: Created separate pages for home, about, blog, contact, and course-related content
Focused on building a polished educational website layout with clear navigation
Practiced multi-page front-end development using reusable styling patterns
Improved visual consistency across different pages and sections

title: Ecology
subtitle: Environmental Awareness Website
desc: Designed a simple ecology-themed website to present environmental content in a visually engaging and accessible way.
points: Built a static website focused on ecological and environmental presentation
Used clean HTML and CSS structure for a lightweight browsing experience
Focused on readability, layout clarity, and thematic visual styling
Practiced early-stage front-end design through topic-driven web presentation

title: JABO Online eTicket System
subtitle: Bus Passenger Ticketing System
desc: Built a desktop-based e-ticketing solution for bus passengers to support ticket booking and transport service management through a Java Swing interface.
points: Designed a ticketing workflow tailored for bus passenger services
Built the application using Java Swing for desktop-based interaction
Focused on simplifying booking and transport-related information handling
Practiced event-driven UI development through a transport management use case

title: Smart Cricket Stadium
subtitle: Arduino-Based Stadium Automation System
desc: Developed an Arduino-based smart cricket stadium system with automated pitch covering, boundary monitoring, power-play support, adaptive lighting, and solar tracking.
points: Implemented an automated pitch-covering mechanism for unstable weather conditions
Built systems for boundary line fixing, player counting, and light brightness control
Integrated sensors and actuators including rain sensors, LDR, IR, stepper motors, and servo motors
Designed the project as an electronics lab solution to improve automation and decision support in cricket

title: Personal Assistant Robot for Elderly People
subtitle: Elderly Care Support Robot
desc: Worked on a personal assistant robot concept aimed at supporting elderly people through assistive services, monitoring, and human-centered system design.
points: Explored assistive technology concepts focused on elderly care and support
Worked on a system combining robotics ideas with service-oriented interaction design
Focused on practical caregiving use cases such as monitoring, support, and accessibility
Contributed to building a project around real-life quality-of-life improvement

title: HEIC to JPG Converter
subtitle: Batch Image Conversion Utility
desc: Created a lightweight Python utility to convert HEIC images to JPG format in batch, making photo compatibility easier across platforms and workflows.
points: Built a script to convert all HEIC files in a folder into JPG format
Added support for selecting source and destination folders through terminal input
Designed the tool to work across Windows, macOS, and Linux environments
Focused on simplicity and practical usability for everyday file conversion tasks

title: UIU Enterprise Network Design
subtitle: Cisco Packet Tracer Network Simulation
desc: Designed and implemented a realistic enterprise network for United International University using Cisco Packet Tracer, focusing on routing, subnetting, NAT, and DHCP.
points: Designed a functional enterprise-style network with routers, switches, and hosts
Implemented subnetting, routing, NAT, and DHCP based on real-world networking principles
Simulated and tested the topology in Cisco Packet Tracer
Completed the project as part of a Computer Network Lab assignment

title: UIU Question Bank
subtitle: Academic Question Archive Contribution
desc: Contributed academic question collection and learning support content for a UIU question bank initiative aimed at helping CSE students prepare more effectively.
points: Supported a question-bank style academic resource for UIU CSE students
Helped organize and contribute exam-related learning materials and question collections
Focused on improving accessibility of previous questions for student preparation
Contributed to a student-centered educational support initiative

title: NeoCura
subtitle: Personal Assistant Robot for Elderly People
desc: Built a personal-assistant robot platform for elderly care with robot control, live camera feed, health monitoring, activity logging, and a service-oriented dashboard.
points: Implemented robot movement control and live camera/video feed support
Built health monitoring endpoints for metrics like heart rate and steps
Added activity logging and emergency-related action tracking
Designed a basic dashboard and service UI using a Flask-based backend

title: DefectoMCU Inspection System
subtitle: PCB Defect Detection Research Project
desc: Worked on an AI-driven PCB inspection pipeline for detecting defects in microcontroller and circuit board imagery using computer vision and deep learning workflows.
points: Explored defect detection workflows for PCB and MCU inspection use cases
Worked with image-based analysis and dataset preparation for visual inspection
Focused on improving defect identification using machine learning approaches
Contributed to an applied computer-vision research direction
